zh.Rood Ashton Hall, West Ashton, St Thomas: 英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特聖 多馬 馮 阿波斯特萊也斯 邱奇
zh.Merryfield, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文梅利費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Chudleigh於大約1495年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir William Chudleigh20歲，母親Joan Hody17歲。他於大約1512年與Mary Wadham在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年8月26日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾希頓。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Chudleigh was born about 1495, in Devon, England, his father, Sir William Chudleigh, was 20 and his mother, Joan Hody, was 17. He married Mary Wadham about 1512, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 26 August 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ashton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Chudleigh est né environ 1495, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Chudleigh, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Hody, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mary Wadham environ 1512, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 26 août 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ashton, Devon, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Chudleigh(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Chudleigh(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hody(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1512년 영국에서 Mary Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 8월 26일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 애슈턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Mary Wadham aproximadamente 1512, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Chudleigh родился около 1495 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Chudleigh было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hody, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Wadham около 1512 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 26 августа 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности аштон, девон, Англия.
